entity.label: Chitlish
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A man’s wall, a town in the plain of Judah (Josh. 15:40). It has been identified with Jelameh.

nodes.label: Chitlish
nodes.description: A man’s wall, a town in the plain of Judah (Josh. 15:40). It has been identified with Jelameh.

verses.text: And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,
